market_pulse: Weekend momentum strong across LIV, OMNIA, Encore, and Zouk; David Guetta headlining LIV Beach tonight, Tiesto/Steve Aoki/Meduza drive OMNIA/Zouk competition.

weekend_readiness.label: HIGH
factors: David Guetta confirmed at LIV Beach Saturday (today)
OMNIA running 3-day lineup (Tiesto 5/29, Steve Aoki 5/30, Deseo Sundays 5/31)
Meduza at Zouk Saturday, strong momentum
Marshmello at Encore Beach Club today
Multiple high-profile talent announcements across 4+ venues
weekend_readiness.liv_recommendation: LIV Beach is positioned well with Guetta today. Ensure real-time story updates, behind-the-scenes content, and crowd moments. Monitor Zouk/OMNIA IG Stories for competitive energy spikes. Consider pushing exclusive LIV lineup content for Sunday/Monday edge.

content_gaps.description: High-energy bass-heavy remixes and trending TikTok sounds missing from LIV Beach posts; competitors using Medusa-style progressive house audio
content_gaps.suggested_action: Create 3-5 short-form clips with trending Zouk/OMNIA track IDs, remix covers, and user-generated UGC reels leveraging David Guetta catalog for Sunday boost

content_gaps.description: Competitors (OMNIA, Zouk, Encore) running countdown/flash sale stories; LIV has weak story engagement signals
content_gaps.suggested_action: Post 5-7 countdown stickers starting now for tonight's Guetta set, live polls (e.g., 'Guetta track voting'), and 'last 100 tickets' alerts

content_gaps.description: No detected influencer takeovers or @mentions from micro-influencers in LIV search results; competitors feature creator content heavily
content_gaps.suggested_action: Tag 3-5 Vegas lifestyle influencers in LIV Beach Guetta posts, request Stories re-shares, offer exclusive comp tables to amplify reach
